title: I just signed him for one user, and was charge $1200 in my account I need help?
excerpt: I’ve been trying to contact the billing department I’ve been charged for $1200 in my account I need some one please

posts.author: LETTO2022 (TONY)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve been trying to contact the billing department I’ve been charged for $1200 in my account I need some one please

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @LETTO2022

Welcome to the Community

Sorry to hear you’re having billing issues! Unfortunately we aren’t able to assist with these issues via the Community, but we definitely want to take a closer look into this.
Could you please reach out to our support team via support@monday.com?
They’ll be able to take a closer look and continue to assist.

Best,

Dani
